name: Stockland
analysis: SGP has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 35% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$4.3000, stop A$3.6729, target A$5.1100 (1.29:1) — then trail it.
